hero.label: Meet the team
hero.title: The people behind
hero.description: Seventy of us - shooters, editors, marketers, engineers and closers - who have spent a decade getting good at one thing: growing your business.

features.title: Money over likes
features.description: If something does not move your pipeline, we do not ship it. Every project ties back to a real number.

features.title: Everything connects
features.description: Video feeds the ads, the ads feed the CRM, the AI feeds the closers. No piece works alone.

features.title: Skin in the game
features.description: Our closers earn base or commission, whichever is higher - so they are motivated to actually close, and we win when you win.

process.title: We built what we
process.subtitle: We spent years in sales watching good companies lose deals because their online presence didn't reflect how good they actually were. Agencies would charge a fortune for content that looked great and did nothing. So we built the thing we kept wishing existed. One team that connects your content to how you actually sell.

steps.title: Audit
steps.description: We start by listening. What are you selling? What's your site saying? Where do leads go after they show up?

steps.title: Build
steps.description: We make the things you need. The site, the videos, the CRM setup. One team, not five vendors.

steps.title: Scale
steps.description: We make sure it keeps working. Your team learns the system. Results get tracked. Things get better over time.

team.title: The people behind the
team.subtitle: A small team that builds, shoots, codes, and coaches. We've all sold something before. That's why this works.

selectedWork.title: What we make
selectedWork.subtitle: A sample of recent projects across video, brand, and growth.
